untranslatable_reason: Cup pattern detection requires visual/morphological pattern recognition (cup-shaped bottom formation with specific geometry) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators and operators. The signal requires identifying: (1) a distinct U-shaped valley with specific proportions, (2) resistance levels at cup rim, (3) breakout confirmation above resistance. These require candlestick pattern analysis or custom pattern-matching logic not available in the indicator set. Exit condition '20% decline from ultimate high' is also untranslatable without a dynamic peak-tracking mechanism.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses Donchian breakout as a proxy for cup breakout detection, but this does not capture the actual cup morphology. The 34% average rise and 68% bull market success rate are documented but cannot be operationalized without explicit pattern detection. The 70-day time horizon to ultimate high is set as hold_days_max but should ideally be conditional on market regime (>50% in bull, ~33% in bear per source text).
